meta.title: Ethereum Access Control Risk Report
meta.disclaimer: Informational, defensive security research. Rows document privileged authority paths and are not asserted to be exploitable third-party vulnerabilities.

rows.functionPath: enumerate 11,812 sUSDe holders from local reth Transfer logs → grant FULL_RESTRICTED_STAKER_ROLE to each holder → → redistributeLockedAmount(holder, admin Safe) for each holder → setCooldownDuration(0) → → redeem(totalSupply - MIN_SHARES, controlled recipient, admin Safe) → wait 8 hours for reward vesting → → redeem(MIN_SHARES, controlled recipient, admin Safe)
